description: Reproduces peer discovery bug where whereis() hangs because peers connected to the same relay cannot find each other

nodes._comment: Server times out because client never contacts it
Client times out at whereis() - this is the bug

_notes.bug_description: Peers connected to the same local relay cannot discover each other
_notes.root_cause: Relay is pure circuit relay, DHT uses global bootstrap nodes
_notes.expected_behavior: Client should find server via whereis('@server', 'echo')
_notes.actual_behavior: Client hangs at whereis() until timeout
